method.source_policy: Use official Government of India, Government of Tamil Nadu and Greater Chennai Corporation sources for regulated or government-facing steps.

activities.reason: Transport, identity, baggage, local transfers, medicines and family coordination commonly require timed preparation.
Passport, destination entry rules, insurance, foreign exchange, customs and airport timing create high consequences for missed steps.
Guest count, venue, food, accessibility, weather, vendors and child-safety tasks require coordinated deadlines.
Venue, ceremony, guests, vendors, payments, legal registration and travel logistics span many months and parties.
Home readiness, ceremony, food, parking, neighbours and post-event cleanup benefit from an ordered plan.
Availability, slot selection, charges, deposit, capacity and restricted uses must be checked before payment.
Time-sensitive family communication, records, transport and ceremony arrangements require calm delegation.
Venue, permissions, student safety, transport, stage operations and vendor coordination create dependencies.
Public attendance may trigger venue, crowd, food, electrical, sound, traffic and safety requirements.
